How's it going everybody? In this video we're going to cover creating your Wufu form. This Wufu form is going to be embedded into the third page of your click funnel So we're going to show you how to create that form and also where to put the embed code on your tracking document So go ahead and open up Wufu just like I have on the left get signed in create a new form and below this video We have a sample form and we're actually going to have you copy and paste the information from here That way you don't have to type everything up from scratch So below this video click on that button and you should see this form that you have on the left All right, so the first thing we want to do is get that title in there So I'm going to select our title from the built form and click on the untitled form Click in that form title box select everything that's in there and paste that way we replace it I'm going to do the same thing for the description Copy it and paste it I'm going to hit add a field over here on the left. I'm going to choose name Let's click on name and make sure it's required Next one's going to be email. So add a field email We'll click on email and make that required as well The next one is would you prefer phone color Skype? Let's go and make sure that's required Let's go ahead and head back to add a field Maybe just save it in there. That's okay. And the next one's going to be please enter your phone number or Skype ID Depending on your answer above. I Went ahead and made all of those Responses I'm going to make that required And then we have a if other please specify.
